message:
Add axis-aware gradient broadcasting for partial reductions in VJP backward pass

- Extract reduced axes from params in the reduce_sum VJP path and pass
  kept axes to a new broadcast_g_to_shape_with_axes helper, correctly
  broadcasting partial-reduction gradients back to the input shape along
  the specific dimensions that were reduced
- Add broadcast_dimensions parameter to BroadcastInDim primitive call
  when non-trivial axis mapping is needed, enabling correct gradient
  shape recovery for reductions along specific axes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
